testsuite.name: io.slogr.agent.engine.probe.IcmpPingProbeTest

testcase.name: all probes timeout - 100 percent loss and null RTT stats()
all probes respond - stats computed correctly()
probe uses TTL 64 not a traceroute TTL()

testsuite.system-out: 21:14:19.238 [Test worker @coroutine#19] DEBUG io.mockk.impl.instantiation.AbstractMockFactory -- Creating mockk for NativeProbeAdapter name=#31 21:14:19.241 [Test worker
